---
name: Bug report
about: Report an issue with MyTE Autofill Helper
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

Bug reports with clear reproduction details may be automatically assigned to GitHub Copilot for investigation and a draft fix PR.

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Navigate to MyTE timesheet page
2. Click on '...'
3. Configure '...'
4. Observe error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 🖼️ Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

**Browser & Extension:**

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Edge]
- Browser Version: [e.g. 120.0.6099.109]
- Extension Version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sonoma]

**MyTE Configuration:**

- Number of WBS codes: [e.g. 3]
- Daily hours configured: [e.g. 7.7]
- Using HW/Office pattern: [Yes/No]
- Compliance checkboxes enabled: [Yes/No]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here:

- Does it happen consistently or intermittently?
- Did it work in a previous version?
- Any console errors? (F12 → Console tab)
- If you attach a screenshot, include the visible URL and any error toast or popup state
